# PuButton

## Intent

- command button
- loading command
- icon button

## Prefer When

- Use for user-triggered commands, form actions, and compact icon commands.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for plain navigation unless the implementation supports link semantics.

## Import

```ts
import { PuButton } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```

## Props

- `text`
- `prefixIcon`
- `suffixIcon`
- `showDot`
- `toggled`
- `active`
- `theme`
- `type`
- `size`
- `rounded`
- `disabled`
- `loading`
- `customStyle`
- `default`

## Slots

- No slots extracted.

## Events

- `click`
- `_event`

## Composition

- PuPageHeader
- PuFormItem
- PuModal
- PuCard

## Story Variants

Story: `src/stories/actions/PuButton.story.vue`

- Themes
- Sizes
- States
- Icons

## Types

- `ButtonSize`
- `ButtonTheme`
- `ButtonType`

## Caveats

- Uses legacy theme, type, and size values rather than canonical tone/size vocabulary.
- Icon-only buttons need an accessible label.
